name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, its references, or its tooling

labels: enhancement

**The problem / job-to-be-done**
<!-- What recurring situation is underserved today? -->

**Proposed change**
<!-- What should the skill (or its validators/docs) do differently? -->

**Scope**
- [ ] Skill / reference content
- [ ] Validators / tests / CI
- [ ] Packaging / installer / landing page
- [ ] Docs

**Notes**
<!-- Alternatives considered, examples, or a host where this matters most. -->
